name: Copycat Orange Julius
directions: Combine all ingredients except ice in blender and blend on high for 15-30 seconds.
Add the ice and blend for another 10-15 seconds or so, until ice is mostly crushed yet still a bit coarse.

name: Orange Julius Knock-Off!!!
directions: Combine all of the ingredients except ice in a blender and blend on high speed for 15-30 seconds or until the sugar is dissolved.
Add the ice and blend until the consistancy of your average icy --  making sure there are ice bits but not chunks! :).

name: Orange Julius
directions: Combine all of the ingredients except ice in a blender and blend on high speed for 15 seconds or until the sugar is disolved.
Add the ice and blend for another 30 seconds or until ice is completely crushed.

name: Orange Julius
directions: Combine all of the ingredients except ice in a blender and blend on high speed for 15 to 30 seconds or until the sugar is dissolved.
Add the ice and blend for another 10 to 15 seconds or so, until ice is mostly crushed yet still a bit coarse.

name: Orange Julius
directions: Place all ingredients in blender and liquefy until smooth.

name: Orange Julius Remake !!
directions: In a blender combine orange juice, milk, sugar, and vanilla.  Blend for 30 seconds. Add ice cubes 2-3 at a time.  Blend for 30 seconds more after the last ice cube has been put inches Pour and enjoy.

name: Orange Julius
directions: Combine all of the ingredients in a blender set on high speed for 15-30 seconds.

name: Orange Julius
directions: Mix all ingredients well in a blender until quite foamy on top. Makes 4 servings.
